title: Beyond a certain point, governments are certain to nationalize AI
body:
It is clear to me that if AGI were created tomorrow by one of the leading AI labs, the United States government would nationalize it.
I have to believe that this is also clear to leaders at these companies. Would they come out and say they had made AGI if they did? What would their plan be to keep their ownership of it if they did?
I am suspect of a lot of the accusations that billionaires are trying to create their own techno feudlist societies, but if you really thought that your AGI would be taken by the state, maybe you would want to create your own state
